title: bidens chrysanthemifolia
intro: Bidens chrysanthemifolia, also known as the bidentate or swamp marigold, is a plant species belonging to the aster family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Bidens chrysanthemifolia include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as cough and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
